name: ccmaf-skills
description: CCMAF Skills — a library of production-grade, vendor-neutral engineering skills for Claude Code and compatible agent runtimes.

plugins.name: ccmaf-skills
plugins.description: All 71 CCMAF skills as one plugin — senior-level engineering standards across languages, frameworks, cloud and operations, data, AI/agents, security and identity, plus agent-workflow and prose-quality disciplines (planning, recap, docs-grounding, debugging, incident response, usage limits, de-slopping).
